race.description: Chemsave Narrandera Pharmacy Super Mdn Showcase Plate
race.comment: WINTER HAIL (4) made progress last prep earlier in the year before training off in his last 2 runs. That spell has done him the world of good, and he was winning comfortably at a recent Wagga trial. He will be ready to rumble fresh, and he won't be in this class for long. INZAIN BABY (2) whacked away late when finishing a well-beaten fifth fresh up on a heavy track at Albury nearly 2 weeks ago. He cops a wide gate, but his stable is in hot form at the moment, and he can be a sharp improver. COACHELLA LASS (6) has recently changed stables after a couple of reasonable efforts to kick off her career in country Victoria. A recent trial placing was sound, and from a good gate, she has top 4 claims. IMPENETRABLE (7) ran her best race yet when finishing fourth at Wagga 6-days ago, and if this race has not come too soon for her, then she is worth including as well.
